summary: Twin Wake reads well as a compact, print-friendly abstract part: a low base with two rising ribbon arms that twist upward in a mirrored pair. I’ve kept the geometry conservative so it can print on FDM without getting cute with support needs. The ribbon sections are held at a minimum 3 mm thickness, and the overall proportions are tuned to fit the 140 x 70 x 45 mm envelope.
parameters: hole_d = 0; // reserved for later mounting refinement
fillet_r = 2; // conceptual, hand-finish later if desired
fit_checks: Confirm hole spacing on the Twin Wake.
Check fastener clearance and wrench access.
Verify drain path does not weaken the load path.
export_detail: Exported a simple fit-check STL using 45.00 x 70.00 x 140.00 mm derived from the supplied dimensions. CadQuery export failed and fell back safely: More than one wire or face is required
